hero.title: Es Currals Alpacas Ibiza
hero.subtitle: The very first alpaca farm in Ibiza, located in the rural north on an authentic finca. Home to Wishfulfilling Weaving, where exclusive scarves are hand-woven on a traditional wooden loom using alpaca wool.

tour.description: Experience our farm, meet the alpacas, learn the weaving craft, and enjoy the Ibiza landscape.

tours.timelineTitle: What to Expect on a Tour

arrival.title: Welcome & Orientation
arrival.description: Meet your guide, receive an overview of the day, and learn farm guidelines. Settle in and let the calm take over.

morning.title: Meet the Alpacas
morning.description: Spend time with our herd. Feed, pet, and learn the stories of our animals. Guides share insights on alpaca behavior and care.

midday.title: Weaving Studio Tour
midday.description: Explore our studio. See the full process: fiber preparation, natural dyeing, traditional patterns, and final finishing.

afternoon.title: Hands-On Activity
afternoon.description: Participate in a workshop or activity based on your interests: try hand-carding, dyeing, or simple weaving techniques.

closing.title: Relax & Reflect
closing.description: Wind down with refreshments. Browse our shop. Ask final questions. Leave with a heart full of memories.

hours.title: Operating Hours
hours.description: Tours by appointment only. Availability varies by season.

location.title: Location
location.details: Private farm. Directions and parking info provided upon booking.

guestStories.title: Guest Stories
guestStories.subtitle: See what visitors say about their experience
guestStories.testimonial: An unforgettable experience. The alpacas were wonderful, the guides were knowledgeable and warm, and the whole farm exuded peace and authenticity.

reviews.sue: I visited at the end of August and had a fantastic time! Ibiza has so much to offer in addition to the music and I would highly recommend a visit to see the beautiful Alpacas. You can feed them and learn so much about these amazing animals ❤️. I was warmly welcomed and had such a valuable experience. Go and see them - you'll love it and them!
reviews.verena: We visited the sweet, fluffy alpacas. A super nice couple guides you through the alpaca enclosures with great information about these animals. You have the opportunity to feed, pet, and even give an alpaca kiss. The animals are very trusting and are thrilled by your closeness and food. It was a wonderful experience and I can only recommend it to everyone who is in Ibiza. 🤗🥳
reviews.gemma: I made a group booking for 6 of us for Friday 9th May. Bart got in touch to let me know that they were actually closed that day because they were shearing the Alpacas. He then kindly offered to accommodate us the day before even though the farm was closed, it was really kind of him to do so. The experience itself was amazing. Bart was so knowledgeable and friendly and the Alpacas were so sweet. All the Alpacas are very well cared for and adore Bart which shows how much he loves them.
reviews.renate: Really fun to do with our 2 boys aged 12, but actually fun for all ages. We actually knew nothing about Alpacas, it was very interesting! It took exactly one hour.
reviews.sven: Highly recommended! Bart & San run a fantastic operation. The ultimate Chill Out experience 🦙❤️🦙
reviews.paul: Went September 23, amazing tour, Bart is so knowledgeable and friendly. If you have a car it's a must 😀🦙

faq.sectionSubtitle: Everything you need to know before your visit

duration.q: How long is a typical tour?
duration.a: Standard tours are 2–3 hours. Workshops and extended experiences can be customized. We recommend checking available time slots when booking.

languages.a: We offer tours in English, Spanish, and Dutch. If you need another language, please contact us.

children.a: Yes! Tours are family-friendly. Children should be supervised, especially around the animals. We recommend ages 4+, but younger children can come with parental guidance.

wear.a: Wear comfortable, closed-toe shoes suitable for farm terrain. Bring sun protection in summer. Light layers are ideal, as the farm is outside. Avoid loud colors or strong perfumes to keep alpacas calm.

accessibility.q: Is the farm accessible for people with disabilities?
accessibility.a: Our farm is on natural terrain. Please contact us ahead to discuss accessibility and how we can accommodate your needs.

food.q: Can we bring food or drinks?
food.a: Outside food is not permitted, but we offer organic refreshments. We accommodate dietary restrictions—mention this when booking.

booking.q: How do I book a tour?
booking.a: Use our online booking system below to check availability and reserve your spot. Group bookings and custom experiences: contact us for options.

cancellation.q: What if I need to cancel or reschedule?
cancellation.a: Cancellations up to 48 hours before your tour receive a full refund or rebooking. Less notice incurs a 50% fee.

private.q: Do you offer private tours or group events?
private.a: Yes! We offer private farm experiences, weddings, corporate retreats, and alpaca yoga sessions. Contact us for custom packages.

parking.a: Yes, free parking is available on-site. Spots are limited—arrive 15 minutes early to allow parking time.

corporate.title: Corporate Retreats & Team Building
corporate.subtitle: Disconnect to reconnect. Bring your team to Ibiza's peaceful countryside for a unique bonding experience with our alpaca herd.
corporate.whyText: Alpacas are sensitive, calming animals that mirror human energy. Interacting with them requires patience, observation, and non-verbal communication — perfect skills for effective teamwork.

stress.title: Stress Reduction
stress.description: Alpacas' calming presence reduces cortisol and promotes mindfulness.

communication.title: Communication
communication.description: Learn to lead without force. Alpacas respond to calm assertiveness.

creativity.title: Creativity
creativity.description: Weaving workshops stimulate creative problem-solving and focus.

nature.title: Nature Connection
nature.description: Get your team out of the office and into the fresh Mediterranean air.

romantic.title: Romantic Sunset Walks

romantic.quote: "The most magical date we've ever had."
romantic.description: Escape the crowds. Just you, your partner, and our gentle alpacas strolling through the orange groves as the sun dips behind the hills.

champagne.title: Champagne
champagne.desc: Optional Cava add-on to toast the sunset.

photos.title: Photos
photos.desc: Your guide captures candid moments so you can stay in the moment.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.desc: Strictly private tours available on request.

romantic.proposalText: Thinking of popping the question? We can help orchestrate the perfect moment with the alpacas as your witnesses.

family.title: Family Farm Days
family.subtitle: Introduce your kids to the joy of animals. Safe, educational, and fun for all ages.
family.educationText: Our farm isn't just a petting zoo — it's an educational experience. Kids learn:

points.respect: Respect: How to approach animals gently.
points.biology: Biology: Why alpacas have soft fleece and padded feet instead of hooves.
points.sustainability: Sustainability: How we use alpaca manure ("Oro Negro") for farming.

gentle.title: Gentle Animals
gentle.desc: Our herd is socialized and used to children.

stroller.title: Stroller Friendly
stroller.desc: Paths are accessible for sturdy strollers.

age.a: We welcome all ages! Children under 3 are free. We recommend ages 4+ for the full walking experience.

safe.a: Yes, alpacas do not bite (they only have bottom teeth!) and are generally very calm. We teach your children exactly how to interact safely.

duration.a: Family visits are typically 1.5 to 2 hours, which is perfect for shorter attention spans.

about.title: About Alpacas Ibiza
about.storyText: Alpacas Ibiza was founded on the belief that tourism can be meaningful, artisanal, and deeply connected to animal welfare. We created the first alpaca farm on the island to share our passion for these gentle creatures and their incredible fiber.
about.weavingSubtitle: Made in Ibiza, embracing the world
about.weavingDescription: Wishfulfilling Weaving is our exclusive weaving line. San weaves exclusive scarves on a traditional wooden loom, using high-quality alpaca wool, linen, mohair and silk. Each piece is handcrafted with intention and love in Ibiza.

welfare.title: Animal Welfare
welfare.description: Our alpacas come first in every decision

privacy.section1Intro: We collect information you provide directly:
section1Items: Shop order information (shipping address, payment info)
section2Items: Process tour bookings and shop orders
Send newsletters (you can unsubscribe at any time)
privacy.section3Intro: We take your privacy seriously. Your data is encrypted and stored securely. We do not share your information except:
privacy.section4Text: We use cookies to improve your experience. Essential cookies are required for functionality. You can control cookie preferences in your browser or our cookie banner.
privacy.lastUpdated: Last updated: February 2024. Contact us at hello@alpacasibiza.com for privacy inquiries.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: Please read these terms before using our website and booking services
terms.section1Intro: By booking a tour, you agree to:
section1Items: Follow all farm and animal safety guidelines
Arrive 15 minutes before your scheduled time
Respect the alpacas and farm property
section2Items: Cancellation up to 48 hours ahead: Full refund or rebooking
Weather closure: Full refund or rebooking
terms.section3Intro: All products are handmade. Slight variations and imperfections are normal and part of the artisan process.
section3Items: Shipping within 5–7 business days of order
Returns: 30 days for unused, undamaged items
section4Items: 50% deposit required to secure your project
Cancellation after production starts: 50% refund only
terms.section5Text: By visiting our farm or purchasing our products, you consent to being photographed. These images may be used on our website and social media. If you prefer not to be photographed, inform your guide.
terms.section6Text: Farm visits involve interaction with animals. Visitors assume all risks. We are not liable for injuries unless caused by gross negligence. Children must be supervised at all times.
section7Items: Do not reproduce or redistribute our content without permission
Do not attempt to hack or interfere with the website
terms.lastUpdated: Last updated: February 2024. Contact hello@alpacasibiza.com with questions.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.subtitle: Information about how we use cookies on our website
cookies.whatText: Cookies are small text files stored in your browser. They help websites remember your preferences and track how you use the site.
cookies.essentialText: Required for the website to function. These include:
cookies.preferenceText: Remember your choices (language, theme, etc.) for a better experience.
cookies.analyticsText: Help us understand how you use our site so we can improve it. We use:
cookies.marketingText: Used for retargeting ads and remarketing campaigns. You can opt out at any time.
choicesItems: Essential cookies: Can't be turned off (required for site function)
Analytics & Marketing: Opt out via our cookie banner
Browser settings: Most browsers allow cookie control
Opt-out: Use your browser's 'Do Not Track' setting
cookies.thirdPartyText: We use third-party services that may set their own cookies:
cookies.manageNote: Check your browser documentation for specific instructions.
cookies.gdprText: We comply with GDPR and ePrivacy regulations. We:
gdprItems: Only set non-essential cookies with your consent
cookies.lastUpdated: Last updated: February 2024. Contact hello@alpacasibiza.com for cookie questions.
